normal.description: Audience member sitting calmly and listening to the presenter.

anomalous.description: Audience member suddenly standing up and waving hands repeatedly.

normal.description: Audience member sitting and taking notes.

anomalous.description: Audience member standing on a chair.

normal.description: Audience member raising a hand politely to ask a question.

anomalous.description: Audience member shouting while waving both arms.

normal.description: Audience member walking slowly down the aisle.

anomalous.description: Audience member running down the aisle.

normal.description: Audience member checking a phone while seated.

anomalous.description: Audience member throwing a phone onto the floor.

normal.description: Audience member holding a phone normally.

anomalous.description: Audience member pointing a phone camera very close to another person’s face.

normal.description: Audience member approaching the presenter calmly.

anomalous.description: Audience member suddenly rushing toward the presenter.

normal.description: Audience member handing an object to the presenter.

anomalous.description: Audience member tossing an object toward the presenter.
Audience member aggressively hitting the table or chair.

normal.description: Audience member waving hello toward the camera.

anomalous.description: Audience member jumping repeatedly in front of the camera.

normal.description: Audience member walking normally across the room.

anomalous.description: Audience member intentionally falling to the ground.

normal.description: Audience member sitting upright in a chair.

anomalous.description: Audience member lying on the floor.

normal.description: Audience member placing a backpack on the floor.

anomalous.description: Audience member kicking a backpack across the floor.

normal.description: Audience member placing a laptop on a desk.

anomalous.description: Audience member dropping a laptop abruptly.

normal.description: Audience member walking past the camera.

anomalous.description: Audience member covering the camera lens.

normal.description: Audience member looking briefly at the camera.

anomalous.description: Audience member staring directly into the camera very close to the lens.
